g.title: action.fieldset_group:rollback_group->action.fieldset_group:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (rollback_group) REFERENCES action.fieldset_group(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: action.fieldset:fieldset_group->action.fieldset_group:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (fieldset_group) REFERENCES action.fieldset_group(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
